mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem_submissions (user_id, problem_id, submitted_answer, ai_score, ai_feedback, point_awarded) VALUES (#{userId}, #{problemId}, #{submittedAnswer}, #{aiScore}, #{aiFeedback}, #{pointAwarded})
mapper.select: SELECT ps.*, p.title AS problem_title, p.category, p.difficulty FROM problem_submissions ps JOIN problems p ON ps.problem_id = p.problem_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ps.submitted_at DESC
SELECT problem_id, MAX(ai_score) AS ai_score FROM problem_submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY problem_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem_submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT AVG(ai_score) FROM problem_submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT MAX(ai_score) FROM problem_submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT p.category, AVG(ps.ai_score) AS avg_score FROM problem_submissions ps JOIN problems p ON ps.problem_id = p.problem_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY p.category ORDER BY avg_score DESC

SELECT p.difficulty, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ps.ai_score >= 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count FROM problem_submissions ps JOIN problems p ON ps.problem_id = p.problem_id WHERE ps.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY p.difficulty ORDER BY FIELD(p.difficulty, '상', '중', '하')

SELECT DATE(submitted_at) AS day, COUNT(*) AS count FROM problem_submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(submitted_at) ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem_submissions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
